verse_text: The night is far spent, the day is at hand. Therefore let us cast off the works of darkness, and let us put on the armor of light.

links.context: St. Paul writes similarly to the Christians in Rome ([[ROM.13:12]]).
This is the dawning of the eternal day, and the shadows of ignorance and error depart in the radiance of Christ's glory ([[ROM.13:12]]).
